name: IRS metrics
description: Reports utilising the data collected by IRS on DPS to provide insights for various metrics.

dataset.name: DW actions / day
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('day', correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS day, to_char(MIN(correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, to_char(MAX(correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, COALESCE(correction_requested_by, 'All data wardens') AS dw_username, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN id END) AS sent_back, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN id END) AS held, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' THEN id END) AS recalled, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN id END) AS closed, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN id END) AS marked_as_duplicate, count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN id END) AS marked_as_np, count(id) AS total_actions FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request cr WHERE user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(correction_requested_by)

dataset.name: DW actions / month
dataset.query:
SELECT
  CAST(
    date_trunc('month', correction_requested_at) AS DATE
  ) AS month,
  to_char(MIN(correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date,
  to_char(MAX(correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date,
  COALESCE(correction_requested_by, 'All data wardens') AS dw_username,
 sm.first_name, sm.last_name,
  count(
    CASE
      WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN id
    END
  ) AS sent_back,
  count(
    CASE
      WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN id
    END
  ) AS held,
  count(
    CASE
      WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' THEN id
    END
  ) AS recalled,
  count(
    CASE
      WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN id
    END
  ) AS closed,
  count(
    CASE
      WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN id
    END
  ) AS marked_as_duplicate,
  count(
    CASE
      WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN id
    END
  ) AS marked_as_np,
  count(id) AS total_actions
FROM
  prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request cr
    LEFT JOIN prisons.nomis_STAFF_USER_ACCOUNTS sua on sua.username = cr.correction_requested_by
    LEFT JOIN prisons.nomis_STAFF_MEMBERS sm on sm.staff_id = sua.staff_id
WHERE
  user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN'
GROUP BY
  1,
  ROLLUP (correction_requested_by, first_name, last_name)

dataset.name: % of reports returned / month
dataset.query: SELECT month, min_date, max_date, location, incident_type, all_reports, returned, dw_not_seen, closed, CASE WHEN (all_reports-dw_not_seen) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND((CAST(returned AS decimal(18,2))/(all_reports-dw_not_seen))*100, 1) END AS dw_seen_percentage_returned FROM (SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', created_at) AS DATE) AS month, to_char(MIN(created_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, to_char(MAX(created_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, count(r.id) AS all_reports, count(CASE WHEN cr.requested_corection = '1' THEN r.id END) AS returned, count(CASE WHEN r.status IN ('DRAFT', 'AWAITING_REVIEW') THEN r.id END) AS dw_not_seen, count(CASE WHEN r.status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN r.id END) AS closed FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT report_id, '1' AS requested_corection FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request WHERE user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION') AS cr ON r.id = cr.report_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description))

dataset.name: % of reviews returned / month
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    *, 
    ROUND((CAST(sent_back AS decimal(18,2)) / NULLIF(reports_reviewed, 0)) * 100, 1) AS per_returned 
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CAST(date_trunc('month', correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS month, 
        to_char(MIN(correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, 
        to_char(MAX(correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, 
        COALESCE(location, 'All locations') AS location, 
        COALESCE(incident_type, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, 
        COUNT(report_id) AS reports_reviewed, 
        COUNT(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN report_id END) AS sent_back, 
        COUNT(CASE WHEN user_action <> 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' THEN report_id END) AS completed 
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            report_id, 
            correction_requested_at, 
            location, 
            incident_type, 
            sequence, 
            user_action, 
            prev_dw_action 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                cr.report_id, 
                cr.sequence, 
                cr.user_action, 
                cr.correction_requested_at, 
                ct.description AS incident_type, 
                r.location, 
                -- Added the explicit frame clause required by Redshift
                first_value(sequence) OVER (
                    PARTITION BY report_id 
                    ORDER BY sequence 
                    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
                ) AS first_dw_sequence, 
                lag(user_action) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS prev_dw_action 
            FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr 
            LEFT JOIN (SELECT id, source, type, location FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report) AS r ON cr.report_id = r.id 
            LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code 
            WHERE r.source = 'DPS' 
              AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' 
              AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH')
        ) 
        WHERE (sequence = first_dw_sequence AND user_action <> 'HOLD') 
           OR (sequence = first_dw_sequence + 1 AND prev_dw_action = 'HOLD')
    ) 
    GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(location), ROLLUP(incident_type)
)

dataset.name: Report actions / week
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    CAST(date_trunc('week', cr.correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS week, 
    to_char(MIN(cr.correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, 
    to_char(MAX(cr.correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, 
    COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, 
    COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, 
    count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS num_reports, 
    count(cr.id) AS total_actions, 
    -- Added NULLIF to protect against division by zero errors
    ROUND(CAST(count(cr.id) AS decimal(18,2))/NULLIF(CAST(count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS decimal(18,2)), 0), 1) AS avg_actions_per_report, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_submissions, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_dup, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_nr, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN cr.id END) AS num_held, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_resubmissions, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_dup, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_nr, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back_again, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_ro, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_dw, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_closed, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_dup, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_nr, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_ro, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_dw 
FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT location, id, type, source FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report
) AS r ON cr.report_id = r.id 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        report_id, 
        status AS new_status, 
        changed_by, 
        lag(status) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY changed_at) AS last_status, 
        -- Redshift frame clause added here
        count(status) OVER (
            PARTITION BY report_id 
            ORDER BY changed_at 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) - 2 AS sh_sequence 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_status_history
) AS sh ON cr.report_id = sh.report_id AND cr.sequence = sh.sh_sequence AND cr.correction_requested_by = sh.changed_by 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type
) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code 
WHERE r.source = 'DPS' 
GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: Report actions / month
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    CAST(date_trunc('month', cr.correction_requested_at) AS DATE) AS month, 
    to_char(MIN(cr.correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, 
    to_char(MAX(cr.correction_requested_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, 
    COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, 
    COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, 
    count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS num_reports, 
    count(cr.id) AS total_actions, 
    ROUND(CAST(count(cr.id) AS decimal(18,2))/NULLIF(CAST(count(DISTINCT(cr.report_id)) AS decimal(18,2)), 0), 1) AS avg_actions_per_report, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_submissions, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_dup, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_first_req_nr, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status = 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'HOLD' THEN cr.id END) AS num_held, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_REVIEW' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_resubmissions, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_dup, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_add_req_nr, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'REQUEST_CORRECTION' AND last_status <> 'DRAFT' THEN cr.id END) AS num_sent_back_again, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_ro, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status NOT IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_recalled_dw, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'CLOSE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_closed, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_DUPLICATE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_dup, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'MARK_NOT_REPORTABLE' THEN cr.id END) AS num_mark_nr, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE') THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_ro, 
    count(CASE WHEN user_action = 'RECALL' AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' AND last_status IN ('CLOSED', 'DUPLICATE', 'NOT_REPORTABLE')  THEN cr.id END) AS num_reopened_dw 
FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT location, id, type, source 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report
) AS r ON cr.report_id = r.id 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        report_id, 
        status AS new_status, 
        changed_by, 
        lag(status) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY changed_at) AS last_status, 
        -- Added explicit frame clause for Redshift compatibility
        count(status) OVER (
            PARTITION BY report_id 
            ORDER BY changed_at 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) - 2 AS sh_sequence 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_status_history
) AS sh ON cr.report_id = sh.report_id AND cr.sequence = sh.sh_sequence AND cr.correction_requested_by = sh.changed_by 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT code, description 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type
) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code 
WHERE r.source = 'DPS' 
GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: RO submission statistics / month
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', reported_at) AS DATE) AS month, to_char(MIN(reported_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, to_char(MAX(reported_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, COALESCE(location, 'All locations') AS location, count(id) AS total_reports, ROUND(AVG(time_diff_mins),1) AS avg_mins, ROUND(CAST(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY time_diff_mins) AS decimal(18,2)),1) AS median_mins, ROUND(MAX(time_diff_hrs),1) AS longest_submitted_hrs, count(CASE WHEN (time_diff_hrs > 72) THEN id END) AS number_took_too_long, ROUND((CAST(count(CASE WHEN (time_diff_hrs > 72) THEN id END) AS decimal(18,2))/CAST(count(id) AS decimal(18,2)))*100, 1) AS perc_too_long, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN time_diff_mins < 4320 THEN time_diff_mins END),1) AS avg_mins_wo_too_long, count(CASE WHEN correction_requested_at IS NULL THEN id END) AS not_yet_actioned, count(CASE WHEN status = 'DRAFT' THEN id END) AS currently_in_draft, count(CASE WHEN status = 'DRAFT' AND (EXTRACT(epoch FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - reported_at))/3600) > 72 THEN id END) AS number_overdue FROM (SELECT *, time_diff_mins/60 AS time_diff_hrs FROM (SELECT r.id, r.location, r.type, r.status, r.reported_at, cr.correction_requested_at, cr.user_action, CASE WHEN (correction_requested_at IS NOT NULL) THEN ROUND((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (cr.correction_requested_at - r.reported_at)))/60, 1) ELSE NULL END AS time_diff_mins FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r LEFT JOIN (SELECT report_id, correction_requested_at, user_action FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request WHERE sequence = 0 AND user_action IN ('REQUEST_REVIEW', 'REQUEST_NOT_REPORTABLE', 'REQUEST_DUPLICATE') AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER') AS cr ON r.id = cr.report_id WHERE location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') AND source = 'DPS')) GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(location)

dataset.name: Feedback durations / month
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    dwlp.month, 
    dw.min_date, 
    dw.max_date, 
    dwlp.location, 
    dw.number_of_dw_responses, 
    dw.dw_resp_time_days, 
    ro.number_of_ro_responses, 
    ro.ro_resp_time_days, 
    dwlp.number_of_loops, 
    dwlp.feedback_loop_days 
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CAST(date_trunc('month', r.created_at) AS DATE) AS month, 
        COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, 
        COUNT(stats.time_since_last) AS number_of_loops, 
        ROUND(AVG(stats.time_since_last)/24, 1) AS feedback_loop_days 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r 
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT cr.report_id, diff.time_since_last 
        FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr 
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT report_id, sequence, time_since_last 
            FROM (
                SELECT 
                    *, 
                    sequence - lag(sequence) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS seq_diff, 
                    ROUND((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (correction_requested_at - lag(correction_requested_at) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence))))/3600, 1) AS time_since_last 
                FROM (
                    SELECT cr.report_id, sequence, correction_requested_at 
                    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request AS cr 
                    LEFT JOIN (
                        SELECT report_id, CASE WHEN count(id) > 1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END AS marker 
                        FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request 
                        WHERE user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN' 
                        GROUP BY report_id
                    ) AS mk ON cr.report_id = mk.report_id 
                    WHERE mk.marker IS NOT NULL AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN'
                ) AS inner_sub -- Alias added here
            ) AS outer_sub -- Alias added here
            WHERE seq_diff > 1
        ) AS diff ON cr.report_id = diff.report_id AND cr.sequence = diff.sequence 
        WHERE diff.time_since_last IS NOT NULL
    ) AS stats ON r.id = stats.report_id 
    WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') 
    GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location)
) AS dwlp 
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CAST(date_trunc('month', r.created_at) AS DATE) AS month, 
        COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, 
        COUNT(stats.time_since_last) AS number_of_ro_responses, 
        ROUND(AVG(stats.time_since_last)/24, 1) AS ro_resp_time_days 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r 
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT report_id, time_since_last 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                *, 
                ROUND((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (correction_requested_at - lag(correction_requested_at) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence))))/3600, 1) AS time_since_last, 
                lag(user_type) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS last_user_type 
            FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request
        ) AS ro_sub -- Alias added here
        WHERE user_type <> last_user_type AND user_type = 'REPORTING_OFFICER'
    ) AS stats ON r.id = stats.report_id 
    WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') 
    GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location)
) AS ro ON dwlp.month = ro.month AND dwlp.location = ro.location 
JOIN (
    SELECT 
        CAST(date_trunc('month', r.created_at) AS DATE) AS month, 
        to_char(MIN(r.created_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, 
        to_char(MAX(r.created_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, 
        COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, 
        COUNT(stats.time_since_last) AS number_of_dw_responses, 
        ROUND(AVG(stats.time_since_last)/24, 1) AS dw_resp_time_days 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report AS r 
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT report_id, time_since_last 
        FROM (
            SELECT 
                *, 
                ROUND((EXTRACT(epoch FROM (correction_requested_at - lag(correction_requested_at) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence))))/3600, 1) AS time_since_last, 
                lag(user_type) OVER (PARTITION BY report_id ORDER BY sequence) AS last_user_type 
            FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request
        ) AS dw_sub -- Alias added here
        WHERE user_type <> last_user_type AND user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN'
    ) AS stats ON r.id = stats.report_id 
    WHERE r.source = 'DPS' AND r.location NOT IN ('NORTH', 'SOUTH') 
    GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location) 
) AS dw ON dwlp.month = dw.month AND dwlp.location = dw.location

dataset.name: Incidents reopened / week
dataset.query: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('week', sh.changed_at) AS DATE) AS week, to_char(MIN(sh.changed_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, to_char(MAX(sh.changed_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, count(sh.report_id) AS reopened_count FROM prisons.incidentreporting_status_history AS sh LEFT JOIN (SELECT location, type, id FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report) AS r ON sh.report_id = r.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT code, description FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code WHERE status = 'REOPENED' GROUP BY 1, ROLLUP(r.location), ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: Incidents reopened / month
dataset.query:
SELECT 
    CAST(date_trunc('month', sh.changed_at) AS DATE) AS month, 
    -- Use TO_CHAR for Redshift execution
    to_char(MIN(sh.changed_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS min_date, 
    to_char(MAX(sh.changed_at), 'DD/MM/YYYY') AS max_date, 
    COALESCE(r.location, 'All locations') AS location, 
    COALESCE(ct.description, 'All incident types') AS incident_type, 
    COUNT(sh.report_id) AS reopened_count 
FROM 
    prisons.incidentreporting_status_history AS sh 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT location, type, id 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_report
) AS r ON sh.report_id = r.id 
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT code, description 
    FROM prisons.incidentreporting_constant_type
) AS ct ON r.type = ct.code 
WHERE 
    status = 'REOPENED' 
GROUP BY 
    1, 
    ROLLUP(r.location), 
    ROLLUP(ct.description)

dataset.name: Prisons
dataset.query:
select agy_loc_id prison_id, description prison_name FROM prisons.nomis_agency_locations al 
where al.agency_location_type = 'INST'
and al.active_flag = 'Y' AND al.agy_loc_id NOT IN ('TRN', 'OUT')
order by description

dataset.name: Data wardens
dataset.query:
SELECT 'All data wardens' as dw_username, 'All data wardens' AS full_name UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT correction_requested_by dw_username, INITCAP(sm.first_name) || ' ' || INITCAP(sm.last_name) AS full_name FROM prisons.incidentreporting_correction_request cr JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_STAFF_USER_ACCOUNTS sua ON sua.username = cr.correction_requested_by
 JOIN 
    prisons.nomis_STAFF_MEMBERS sm ON sm.staff_id = sua.staff_id WHERE user_type = 'DATA_WARDEN'
